member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient
member.summary: Client proxy for performing binary RPC calls over shared memory. Provides transparent synchronous processing of binary data with proper cleanup.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout (in milliseconds) for waiting for a response from the server. Must be greater than zero.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified shared memory ID and capacity.
member.param: The capacity (in bytes) of the data region (excluding header).
member.exception: Thrown if id is null or empty.
Thrown if capacity is not positive.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.Initialize(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes shared memory resources, sets up the memory-mapped file and event handle, and warms up the memory pages.
member.param: The capacity (in bytes) of the data region.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.WarmUpMemory
member.summary: Touches each memory page so that pages are committed and loaded into RAM.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.SendRequest(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sends the binary request data to the server and returns an event handle to wait on the response.
member.returns: An EventWaitHandleUniversal instance for synchronizing the response.
member.exception: Thrown if the request size exceeds capacity.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.WaitForResponse(Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleUniversal)
member.summary: Waits for the response event to be signaled within the configured timeout.
member.returns: True if signaled; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.ReadResponse
member.summary: Reads the binary response data from shared memory.
member.returns: The response as a byte array.
member.exception: Thrown if the response length is invalid.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.InvokeSync(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Synchronously sends the request to the server and waits for the response.
member.returns: The binary response data.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.ProcessData(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Processes binary data by sending it to the remote server and waiting for a response.
member.returns: The binary response from the server.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the client and releases all associated resources.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes managed and unmanaged resources used by the client.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.CleanupResources
member.summary: Releases and cleans up all managed resources. Clears the shared memory to avoid residual sensitive data.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryClient.SafeDispose(System.IDisposable)
member.summary: Safely disposes an IDisposable resource while suppressing any exceptions.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer
member.summary: Server wrapper that listens for binary requests via shared memory, processes them, and sends back binary responses. It is designed to provide robust error handling and continuous operation.

member.name: E:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.LogMessage
member.summary: Occurs when an informational message needs to be logged.

member.name: E:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.LogError
member.summary: Occurs when an error message needs to be logged.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.#ctor(System.Func{System.Byte[],System.Byte[]},System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Processing function works with byte arrays.
member.param: A delegate that processes binary request data and returns the response.
Unique identifier used for shared memory resources.
Capacity of the data region in bytes.
member.exception: Thrown if is null.
Thrown if is null, empty, or if is not positive.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.#ctor(System.Func{System.IntPtr,System.Int32,System.Int32},System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Processing function works with pointer to shared memory.
member.param: A delegate that processes binary request data via pointer, accepts pointer to byte array and length, returns new length.
Unique identifier used for shared memory resources.
Capacity of the data region in bytes.
member.exception: Thrown if is null.
Thrown if is null, empty, or if is not positive.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.WarmUpMemory
member.summary: Touches every page of the mapped memory to load it into physical memory.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.StartProcessingLoop
member.summary: Starts the asynchronous processing loop for handling incoming requests.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.ProcessingLoop(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Continuously polls for incoming requests, processes them, and writes responses.
member.param: Cancellation token to stop the loop.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.ProcessByteArray
member.summary: Processes the incoming request and writes the response back to shared memory.
member.exception: Thrown if ReadRequest returns null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.ReadRequest
member.summary: Reads a binary request from shared memory.
member.returns: The request data as a byte array, or null if an error occurs.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.WriteResponse(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Writes the binary response data into shared memory and notifies the client.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.ProcessPointer
member.summary: Processes the incoming request and writes the response back to shared memory using pointer processing.
member.exception: Thrown if ReadRequest returns null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.ReadRequestPtr
member.summary: Get a pointer to the binary request data in shared memory and length of a buffer.
member.returns: A tuple containing pointer to data in shared memory and length of the data.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.WriteResponsePtr(System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes length of binary data already written while processing data via pointer.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.Stop
member.summary: Stops the processing loop.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the server and releases all associated resources.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes managed and unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryBinaryServer.SafeDispose(System.IDisposable,System.String)
member.summary: Safely disposes an IDisposable resource.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleWindows.WaitOneAsyncInternal(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Helper method for all WaitOneAsync overloads.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux
member.summary: POSIX semaphore implementation for Linux.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Threading.EventResetMode,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a POSIX semaphore with a name. For manualReset events this implementation simulates “staying signaled” by reposting after a wait.
member.param: True if the event starts signaled.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOne
member.summary: Waits for the event to be signaled.
member.returns: True if event was signaled or false if it wasn't

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOne(System.Int32)
member.summary: Waits for the event to be signaled.
member.returns: True if event was signaled or false if it wasn't

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOne(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Waits for the event to be signaled.
member.returns: True if event was signaled or false if it wasn't

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOne(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Waits for the event to be signaled.
member.param: Exit context after wait; unused in Linux
member.returns: True if event was signaled or false if it wasn't

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOne(System.TimeSpan,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Waits for the event to be signaled.
member.param: Exit context after wait; unused in Linux
member.returns: True if event was signaled or false if it wasn't

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOneAsync(System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Asynchronously waits for the event to be signaled.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOneAsync(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Asynchronously waits for the event to be signaled.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOneAsync(System.TimeSpan,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Asynchronously waits for the event to be signaled.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOneAsync(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Asynchronously waits for the event to be signaled.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.WaitOneAsync(System.TimeSpan,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Threading.CancellationToken})
member.summary: Asynchronously waits for the event to be signaled.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.Set
member.summary: Sets the event to signaled. If the event is already signaled, no extra post is done.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.Reset
member.summary: Resets (drains) the event to non-signaled by consuming any pending signal.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.GetValue
member.summary: Helper to get the current value of the semaphore.
member.returns: Current value of the semaphore

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.GetTimeout(System.Int32)
member.summary: Helper to compute an absolute timeout in timespec format. sem_timedwait expects an absolute time (CLOCK_REALTIME).

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleLinux.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the semaphore and unlinks it.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.MemoryMappedFileUniversal.CreateOrOpen(System.String,System.Int64,System.IO.MemoryMappedFiles.MemoryMappedFileAccess)
member.summary: Creates or opens a memory-mapped file with the specified name and size (Windows or Linux).
member.returns: Memory mapped file supported in current OS
member.exception: Thrown if attempted to use on OS different from Windows or Linux

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1
member.summary: Client proxy for performing RPC calls over shared memory. Provides transparent method invocation to a remote implementation.
member.typeparam: The interface type that defines the contract for remote calls.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout (in milliseconds) for waiting for a response from the server. Must be greater than zero.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.Initialize(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes the RPC client with the specified identifier and data capacity.
member.param: The unique identifier for the memory mapped file.
The capacity of the data region (in bytes).
member.exception: Thrown if ID is null or empty.
Thrown if capacity is not positive.
Thrown if resource initialization fails.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.Create(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates an instance of the RPC client proxy implementing the specified interface.
member.param: Identifier used to connect to the server.
Capacity of the data region (in bytes).
member.returns: An instance of proxy implementing the interface.
member.exception: Thrown if id is null or empty, or if T is not an interface.
Thrown if initialization fails.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.Invoke(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,System.Object[])
member.summary: Intercepts method calls on the proxy and delegates them as RPC calls.
member.param: The arguments passed to the method.
member.returns: The return value from the remote call, or null for void methods.
member.exception: Thrown if the client is disposed.
Thrown for unsupported method types (async, properties, or out/ref parameters).

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.WarmUpMemory
member.summary: Warms up the memory mapped file by touching each memory page.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.ValidateMethodIsSupported(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Validates that the specified method is supported by the client.
member.exception: If method is null.
If the method is asynchronous, has out/ref parameters, or is a property accessor.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.InvokeSync(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,System.Object[])
member.summary: Synchronously invokes the method on the remote server over shared memory.
member.returns: The result from the remote invocation or null for void methods.
member.exception: If argument counts do not match.
If the server does not respond within the timeout period.
If the server returns an error.
For other communication failures.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.SendRequest(Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationRequest)
member.summary: Sends an invocation request to the remote server via shared memory.
member.returns: An event handle associated with the request for waiting on the response.
member.exception: If the request size exceeds the available capacity.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.WaitForResponse(Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.EventWaitHandleUniversal)
member.summary: Waits for the response event with the current timeout.
member.param: The event handle to wait on.
member.returns: True if the response event was signaled; otherwise, false (timeout).

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.ReadResponse
member.summary: Reads and deserializes the response from shared memory.
member.returns: The deserialized invocation response.
member.exception: If the response length is invalid or deserialization fails.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.GenerateUniqueId
member.summary: Generates and returns a unique identifier for each request. Resets when maximum value is reached.
member.returns: A unique integer identifier.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.SetMsgId(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the unique ID in the shared memory header.
member.returns: The set unique identifier.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.GetMsgId
member.summary: Retrieves the unique ID from the shared memory header.
member.returns: The unique identifier.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.SetMsgDataLength(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the response/request data length in the shared memory header.
member.returns: The set data length.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.GetMsgDataLength
member.summary: Retrieves the data length from the shared memory header.
member.returns: The current data length value.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.ClearSharedMemory
member.summary: Clears the shared memory region by zeroing out its contents. This helps ensure no residual data remains in memory.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the client and releases all associated resources.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes managed and unmanaged resources used by the client.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.CleanupResources
member.summary: Releases and cleans up all managed resources. Also clears the shared memory to avoid residual sensitive data.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCClient`1.SafeDispose(System.IDisposable)
member.summary: Safely disposes an IDisposable resource and suppresses any exceptions.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.MethodArgument
member.summary: Represents a method argument with its type and value.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.MethodArgument.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the fully qualified name of the argument's type.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.MethodArgument.Value
member.summary: Gets or sets the argument value.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationRequest
member.summary: Represents an invocation request containing the method name and its arguments.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationRequest.MethodName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the method to invoke.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationRequest.MethodArguments
member.summary: Gets or sets the array of method arguments.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationResponse
member.summary: Represents an invocation response containing the result of the method call or error information.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationResponse.Result
member.summary: Gets or sets the result of the method invocation.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationResponse.IsError
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether an error occurred during invocation.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationResponse.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets the error message when an error occurs.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.GCLowLatency
member.summary: Temporarily sets the garbage collector latency mode to low latency. Restores the original latency mode when disposed.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.GCLowLatency.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance, setting GC latency to low latency.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.GCLowLatency.Dispose
member.summary: Restores the original GC latency mode.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedBufferWriter
member.summary: A custom unmanaged buffer writer implementing IBufferWriter<byte> to allow zero-copy serialization.

member.name: P:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedBufferWriter.BytesWritten
member.summary: Gets the number of bytes written to the buffer.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedBufferWriter.#ctor(System.Byte*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the specified unmanaged memory region.
member.param: Pointer to the start of the unmanaged memory.
The total capacity of the memory region.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedBufferWriter.Advance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Advances the writer position by the specified count.
member.param: The number of bytes to advance.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedBufferWriter.GetSpan(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a span representing the writable region of the buffer.
member.returns: A writable Span<byte>.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedBufferWriter.GetMemory(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a memory block representing the writable region of the buffer.
member.returns: A Memory<byte>.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedBufferWriter.UnmanagedMemoryManager
member.summary: A minimal MemoryManager for wrapping unmanaged memory.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedReadMemoryManager
member.summary: Provides a MemoryManager wrapping an unmanaged memory region for zero-copy deserialization.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedReadMemoryManager.#ctor(System.Byte*,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with the given unmanaged memory region.
member.param: Pointer to the start of the unmanaged memory.
The length of the memory region.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedReadMemoryManager.GetSpan
member.summary: Gets a span representing the unmanaged memory region.
member.returns: A Span<byte> over the memory region.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedReadMemoryManager.Pin(System.Int32)
member.summary: Pins the memory and returns a memory handle.
member.returns: A MemoryHandle.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedReadMemoryManager.Unpin
member.summary: Not used for unmanaged memory.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.UnmanagedReadMemoryManager.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes the memory manager.

member.name: T:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1
member.summary: Server wrapper that listens for RPC requests via shared memory and sends responses. Implements robust error handling to ensure continuous operation.
member.typeparam: Interface type of the underlying service implementation.

member.name: E:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.LogMessage
member.summary: Event for general informational messages.

member.name: E:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.LogError
member.summary: Event for reporting errors encountered during processing.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.#ctor(`0,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The service implementation for RPC calls.
Unique identifier for shared memory resources.
Capacity in bytes of the data region.
member.exception: Thrown if implementation is null.
Thrown if id is null or empty or if capacity is not positive.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.Dispose
member.summary: Stops processing further requests and releases all server resources.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.WarmUpMemory
member.summary: Touches each memory page to ensure they are loaded into RAM.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.CreateMethodInvoker(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Creates a delegate for invoking a method using expression trees.
member.param: The method info for which to build the invoker.
member.returns: A delegate to invoke the method.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.StartProcessingLoop
member.summary: Starts the background processing loop for handling incoming RPC requests.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.ProcessingLoop(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Waits for an invocation request, processes it, and sends back a response. This loop continues until cancellation is requested.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.ReadInvocationRequest
member.summary: Reads an invocation request from shared memory.
member.returns: The deserialized invocation request if successful; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.ProcessInvocation(Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationRequest)
member.summary: Processes the invocation request by invoking the corresponding service method.
member.returns: An invocation response containing the method result or error information.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.WriteInvocationResponse(Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.InvocationResponse)
member.summary: Writes the serialized invocation response into shared memory and notifies the client.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.RaiseMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Raises an informational log message.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.RaiseError(System.String)
member.summary: Raises an error log message.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.Stop
member.summary: Stops the processing loop and releases internal resources.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.ClearSharedMemory
member.summary: Clears the shared memory region to avoid leaving data in memory.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes managed resources and clears memory to prevent leaks.

member.name: M:Bwl.Framework.SharedMemory.SharedMemoryRPCServer`1.SafeDispose(System.IDisposable,System.String)
member.summary: Safely disposes an IDisposable resource with exception handling.

member.name: T:MessagePack.GeneratedMessagePackResolver
member.summary: A MessagePack resolver that uses generated formatters for types in this assembly.

member.name: F:MessagePack.GeneratedMessagePackResolver.Instance
member.summary: An instance of this resolver that only returns formatters specifically generated for types in this assembly.
